if.test: xtrmPageNo != null and xtrmPageNo != '' and xtrmRowPerPage != null and xtrmRowPerPage != ''

sql.if: SELECT PRIME.* FROM ( SELECT SUBQRY.* , COUNT(1) OVER() AS XTRM_DATA_TOT_COUNT FROM (

if.test: xtrmPageNo != null and xtrmPageNo != '' and xtrmRowPerPage != null and xtrmRowPerPage != ''

mapper.select:
/* [selectComCompanyCombo] 회사코드 콤보박스 로드 */
SELECT A.COMPANY_CODE AS CODE , A.COMPANY_NAME AS CODE_NAME FROM COM_COMPANY A WHERE A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND A.USE_BEGIN_DATE <= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.USE_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD')
